author: Boehner
title: Quality Telemetry That's Always Wrong — dimension_coverage tautology
notes: The bug is real: len(assessments)/max(len(assessments),1) is always 1.0 for non-empty dicts, making dimension_coverage meaningless. However, this is a duplicate of S036 (@Midwest-AI-Solutions, comment 4001669966, submitted 2026-03-05) which identified the exact same tautological formula in the same function. S207 was submitted a day later on 2026-03-06. Verdict is NO due to duplicate.
